# Copilot Workspace Instructions

Use skills from `.github/skills/` for benchmarked skill tasks. Skills are automatically applied based on user requests.

**MCP servers:**
- Use only benchmark-approved MCP access according to active agent/hook policy.
- Use Context7 as needed for library/framework documentation lookup.

**Workflow:** Always start with `understand-project-structure` skill when beginning work on a project.

**Documentation Updates:** After making any change to the codebase or workspace (model files, configurations, architecture), look for documentation in root workspace folder, and update it to reflect the changes. Ensure tutorials, guides, references, and explanations remain accurate and synchronized with the current state of the project.
